name: catalog_rules
description: SKU / GTIN / price validation rules applied by validate_skus to each canonical product.

sku.description: 3–40 chars, alphanumeric plus . _ -, no leading separator.

gtin.description: 13-digit GTIN/EAN-13 with a valid mod-10 check digit.

price.description: Positive amount within range, in a supported currency.
